chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 6256 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objection No.4 2. For order on CMA No.27857/2024 3. For hearing of main case 13.02.2025 In view of order dated 27.02.2023 passed in CP D 6944 of 2022, matter has to be escalated before the Grievance Commissioner and direct recourse to writ jurisdiction has been deprecated. In view hereof, this petition is found to be misconceived, hence, dismissed. Judge Judge Amjad
